title: Change Type Filter for Field Change History Log
story: As a DataTools Pro user reviewing the field change history log, I want to filter by change type, so that I can focus on specific categories of changes (additions, deletions, modifications) without scrolling through the entire log.
description:
The field change history log displays all detected changes to Salesforce object fields. This feature adds a dropdown filter that allows users to select a specific change type and filter the table to only show matching entries.

The dropdown is populated with the available change types present in the current log data.
acceptance_criteria: A change type dropdown filter appears above the change history table
Dropdown lists all available change types from the current log data
Selecting a change type filters the table to show only matching entries
Selecting 'All' or clearing the filter shows all entries
Filter works without requiring a page reload
ux_changes: Adds a dropdown filter above the change history table. Populated with available change types. Filters the table client-side on selection.
implementation_notes: Client-side filtering using the DataTables API or equivalent. The dropdown values are derived from the change type column in the loaded data.
comment_summary: Developer added the filter dropdown and submitted a screenshot for review on the development environment.
